name: agent-host-e2e-tests
tagline: Adds, records, and troubleshoots agent host end-to-end tests via a record/replay proxy for Claude/Copilot/Codex.
verdict: Compact, precise workflow with strong non-negotiable rules, deterministic gating guidance for non-replayable behavior, and good practice around scrubbing tokens/paths from recorded fixtures before commit. Only real gap: no version/changelog signal (H08 fail). The README it points to lives outside the skill's own directory, so H04 is not-applicable rather.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
